name: Web Notifications Conformance Demo
summary: The runnable proof of the webnotifications push-delivery contract+provider swap seam (#1024, slice C). In-demo recording-stub providers conform to CustomPushProvider and are swapped behind one subscribe()/send()/unsubscribe() call site, so the app issues the same calls while the resolved provider changes underneath; a DeliveryReceipt carries the closed-set status. The runtime providers (native Web Push, FCM/OneSignal/Novu hubs) are impl in Frontier UI — only the contract crosses the seam.
description:
Concept

The runnable proof of the push-delivery contract+provider swap seam (#1024, slice C). In-demo recording-stub providers conform to CustomPushProvider and are swapped behind one subscribe()/send()/unsubscribe() call site.

Verified contract

The app never names a vendor: the same calls deliver while the resolved provider changes, a DeliveryReceipt carries the closed-set status, and both providers satisfy the identical interface. The runtime providers are impl in Frontier UI — only the contract crosses the seam.
